steps.title: Establish the lower bound
steps.content: The lowest recorded temperature was $31^\circ\text{F}$, so no recorded temperature can be below this value. Any recorded temperature $t$ satisfies: $$t \ge 31.$$

steps.title: Establish the upper bound
steps.content: The highest recorded temperature was $67^\circ\text{F}$, so no recorded temperature can exceed this value. Any recorded temperature $t$ satisfies: $$t \le 67.$$

steps.title: Evaluate each answer choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $t \ge 98$ — this claims all temperatures are at least 98°F, which contradicts the given maximum of 67°F. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: $t \ge 67$ — this claims all temperatures are at least 67°F, but the minimum was 31°F. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: $31 \le t \le 67$ — this captures both bounds: temperatures are between 31°F and 67°F inclusive. Kept.
  • Choice D: $t \le 31$ — this claims all temperatures are at most 31°F, but the maximum was 67°F. Eliminated.
That matches Choice C — $31 \le t \le 67$.
